products.title: baby shoes for boys hand-felted home lining in merino wool
products.body_html:
Beautiful felt shoes for babies, which are hand-felted in 100% soft merino wool from Australia.

The felt shoes are equipped with a side closure with elastic, which means that they sit extra well on the feet. The edge of the baby felt shoes is finished with an edge of cotton thread that completes the design.

Are very good in the child's first year. The linings are soft and warm and do not fall off when the child is lying down and kicking. The shoes have no soles and can therefore only be used until the child starts to stand and walk. Therefore, these shoes are only available in sizes from newborn up to 1 year. The shoes are perfect as a gift for the new-born child, for example as a maternity gift or for the christening.

Can be used with bare feet or with a very thin sock on, so that the acclimatizing properties of the wool get the best conditions. Therefore, the shoes can be used all year round, in all seasons.

Material: hand felted in 100% merino wool (wool from Australia). Shoes hand-felted in Clemente production in the Philippines

Materials

Clemente Copenhagen baby felt shoes are hand-felted in 100% merino wool. The merino wool comes from Australia and the shoes are hand-felted in our production in the Philippines.

Baby felt shoes have all suede buttons connected with elastic, which can be shortened as needed by tying a knot. The edge of the baby felt shoes is finished with an edge of cotton thread that completes the design. As natural wool is used, there may be small color differences or a single small straw that has been felted in.

Produced by Clemente Copenhagen

products.title: PIPALUK - mini clutch in certified Inuit sealskin
products.body_html:
PIPALUK cute mini clutch made of Greenlandic Inuit sealskin. Closes with a zipper. Black lining inside. Length 20 cm x 13 cm high x 5 cm bottom.

Materials: Certified Inuit skin from Greenland.

Colors: silver spotted or black sealskin

The actual sale of the Greenlandic Inuit sealskin is done with a good conscience, as you, as a buyer, contribute to a number of different sustainable elements in the process. Among other things, skins are categorized as NON CITES products, which means that the skin does not come from an endangered animal species. All skins are bought through Copenhagen fur and stamped with Great Greenland, so there is no doubt about where the skin comes from.

This beautiful cosmetic purse/mini clutch has the following dimensions: Length 20 cm x 13 cm high x 5 cm bottom. Danish design.

Danish design by the designer Trine Habel, certified Inuit skin from Soul for Seal.

Greenland sealskin:

  • A little about our certified sustainable products from Soul for Seal, which are made exclusively from Greenlandic Inuit sealskins from adult seals. The sealskin products complement the knitwear collections in Little Llama's web shop very nicely.
  • See more about Certified Greenlandic Inuit sealskins under Certified sealskins. According to the European Commission's regulation 1007/209, it is permitted to trade and produce products from certified Greenlandic Inuit sealskin. The skins are also categorized as NON CITES products, i.e. skins from non-endangered animals. You can therefore with a clear conscience buy sealskin products that are made from Greenlandic Inuit sealskin from adult seals. cf. EU regulation (EC) no. 1007/2009.

products.title: SOUL - Baby-children mittens in warm sealskin
products.body_html:
warm baby mittens with lovely warm lining. Made from certified Inuit skin from Greenland. size 6 months - 1½ years.

see also seal food

Danish design by designer Trine Habel.

Greenland sealskin:

A little about our certified sustainable products from Soul for Seal, which are made exclusively from Greenlandic Inuit sealskins from adult seals. This product complements Little Llama's children's collection very nicely.

For the Greenlandic trappers, seal hunting is about food and culture. The prisoners go out primarily to catch food for their families. The seal meat is considered a delicacy and an important source of nutrition. The seal's entrails are given to the dogs and the meat to the family. The skins are a side benefit that the prisoners obtain by selling the skins, and thereby they also create the basis for better economic living conditions.

The Greenlandic seal hunt has always taken place with respect for nature, and the seal population in Greenland has never been threatened. The Greenlandic prisoners only use permitted catching methods, and nothing from the catch goes to waste. All sealskins come from adult seals that have lived a wild life. The EU only allows the import and sale of Greenland seal skins. Each and every seal skin is registered when the catchers sell it on.

The designer Trine Habel designs the bags and Soul for Seal produces and buys the sealskins and therefore has full control over the entire "food chain".

According to the European Commission's regulation 1007/209, it is permitted to trade and produce products from certified Greenlandic Inuit sealskin.

The skins are also categorized as NON CITES products, i.e. skins from non-endangered animals.

The skins were bought at auction through Copenhagen fur, which has the skins from Great Greenland. Each skin is stamped with Great Greenland's logo on the back, so there is no doubt about where the skins come from.

Only Greenlandic Inuit sealskin is used.

You can therefore with a clear conscience buy sealskin products that are made from Greenlandic Inuit sealskin from adult seals.

All products are unique, as the sealskins appear different for natural reasons.

Note See trading conditions before you buy, if you want us to ship to Greenland + countries outside the EU, see Soul for Seal's conditions (www.soulforseal.dk).

EU regulation (EC) no. 1007/2009.

We recommend washing this garment at 30 degrees using a gentle machine cycle and mild detergent soap (specially formulated for wool). To help keep your Merino wool from pilling we recommend washing it inside-out.

products.title: Detergent for wool washing - natural detergent
products.body_html:
Wool wash - natural and chemical-free detergent from Ulrich in a 500 ml glass bottle

DETERGENT FOR WOOL WITH LANOLIN, IN GLASS BOTTLE FOR REFILL


About the product

Only renewable raw materials that have been approved for the Nature Care Product certificate have been chosen for production. These are easily biodegradable and thus very environmentally friendly. In addition, any kind of fragrances have been deliberately chosen, which makes the product particularly suitable for allergy sufferers. The content of lanolin is certified fat-retaining lanolin, which preserves the good properties of wool.

Can be used for all textiles, but particularly suitable for all types of wool, due to its content of lanolin. Can be used for hand and machine washing at temperatures between 30 and 95 degrees, regardless of the hardness of the water.

Detergent in a glass bottle for wool is also available plant-based and as regular detergent in a glass bottle .

Short and compact: the advantages of this product

- Use of renewable raw materials of high quality.
- With lactic acid, which reduces lime deposits.
- Without palm oil, fragrances, optical white and enzymes: Suitable for allergy sufferers.
 - With certified regreasing Lanolin.
- Eco-certified.
- 100% plastic-free product with high-quality glass bottle, wooden lid and removable FSC paper label.

Dosage

The dosage is based on machines with a capacity of 2.5 kg of dry laundry.
Ulrich Natürlich detergent for wool with lanolin in a glass bottle is very economical to use, where only 20 ml is needed for one wash, regardless of the hardness of the water.

Product specifications

All our products are made from renewable raw materials. Likewise, all are free of petrochemicals. All the ingredients in this product are easily biodegradable.

This product contains no dangerous substances, and therefore has no requirements for danger or safety statements.

This product is free of palm oil, fragrances, optical white and enzymes .

The product has been developed without animal testing.

Certification

Ulrich Natürlich detergent for wool with lanolin in a glass bottle is certified by ECO-Control according to the latest Nature Care Products standards. ECO-Control is an inspection and certification body for organic products and a quality assurance system within the non-food area.

Lanolin

Wool contains lanolin, which gives wool its good properties. When exposed to water (rain, washing water, sleet, etc.), the lanolin is eventually washed out of the wool. In order to add lanolin to the wool, and thus retain the wool's good properties, a detergent containing lanolin must be used.

This product contains lanolin that comes from wool from sheep.

Lactic acid

Many detergents contain substances that bind the limescale in the water. The more lime in the water, the more detergent you need to use. The substances go out with the washing water, where it settles and ends up in the sewage treatment plant and thus the sewage sludge.

This detergent contains lactic acid, which neutralizes the scale, instead of bonding with it. This means that, regardless of the amount of lime in your water, you only have to use 20 ml for a full machine wash. The lactic acid is converted with the lime into calcium salt, which is easily soluble in water. When it escapes with the washing water, it ends up in nature, which can use the salt as natural nourishment.

The lactic acid has an antibacterial effect, as well as makes the clothes easier to iron and prevents the clothes from becoming hard/stiff.

Storage

Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight. Should be used within 6-12 months after opening.

Sustainable materials

Our 500 ml bottle is made of glass with wooden screw lid (do not overtighten) and FSC paper label, and thus 100% plastic-free. We recommend purchasing a 500 ml bottle for daily use. After this, we recommend the purchase of cans, for refilling yours glass bottle. With a outlet tap for the can you can easily refill your glass bottle.

products.title: GIFT CARD for Little Llama - choose the amount yourself
products.body_html:
GIFT CARD

Delight a loved one with a gift card for Little Llama's exclusive baby, children's or adult clothing. You get a 10% discount.

Use the gift card for purchases in ours web shop www.LittleLlama.dk

Decide for yourself what the amount should be, you can choose between DKK 300, 500, 700, 900 or 1100. With the 10% discount, you pay 10% less for the gift card than the face value.

e.g. a gift card of DKK 500, you only pay DKK 450 for it. The gift card recipient can therefore buy for DKK 500 in the web shop, when your loved ones buy for DKK 500 or more, shipping is also free.

You select the amount in the menu and decide whether you want to receive the gift card by post or digitally, please write this in the note.

The gift card is valid for 2 years from the time of issue. The gift card can be sent with a cute little card, or sent electronically to your/the recipient's address.

Lost physical gift cards will not be replaced.

etc. Little Llama
